synopsis: Judicial Case 2002-03 consolidated the complaints of Ruling Elders Leland Nichols and Sam Couch against James River Presbytery's handling of West End Presbyterian Church's constitutional request to dissolve the pastoral relationship with TE Robert Wilson. The SJC found that James River Presbytery had no constitutional basis to delay granting the congregation's proper constitutional request to dissolve the pastoral relation and sustained the complainants' arguments on the central issue, while finding some complaints judicially out of order and upholding the presbytery's discretion regarding benevolent gift-giving.
